assertions.text: Documents do not use terms like 'tech stack', 'refactor', 'deploy', 'data model' inappropriately for a writing project
assertions.evidence: HANDOFF.md uses research-appropriate language: 'sections', 'drafts', 'argument framing', 'thematic analysis'. No code-specific terms used inappropriately.

assertions.text: DECISIONS.md includes the 4-section structure (Executive Summary, Methodology, Findings, Recommendations)
assertions.evidence: DECISIONS.md F-3 explicitly records: 'Four-section structure: Executive Summary → Methodology → Findings → Recommendations'

assertions.text: CONTEXT.md mentions interviews completed, survey data, or writing phase
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly mentions 10 interviews + 150 surveys as data collection complete, analysis/writing in progress — and HANDOFF.md stage is 'Data collection complete; analysis and writing phase'
DECISIONS.md F-2 explicitly records: 'Maximum 15 pages' with reason 'Stakeholder constraint — they won't read more'
